title: Hard Bread
description: Troll your friends asking too much food or stealing
body:
# Stops thieves and those who always ask for food!
You had problems with these people come on, im sure you agree, with this mod you can troll people doing this by just giving them a fake bread (if they have F3+H activated bad news they can notice something wrong)
## Choose one
You have two fake breads:
- Thieves
- People that always ask for food

there are obviously the recipes available:
### For thieves
![for thieves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af52edf6fe245a1c84c7a853a5cb6e9cd59f599c.png)
### For people that always ask for food
![for people that always ask for food](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37d4f806d52936c126fd4dea4605807974ea77ee.png)

## What actually does?
Basically, these two fake breads open a GUI with a message and a button with "Got it" and only on the one for thieves it sends a broadcast announcing someone stole bread

See on [gallery](https://modrinth.com/mod/hard-bread/gallery) for GUI and thieves broadcast
